status: complete public-safe online mode classifier; no runtime co-op, versus, team-versus, spectator-admin, second-host LAN, public matchmaking, native BEA netcode, or P3/P4 gameplay proof

sourceStaticAnchors.levelMultiplayerGate: references/Onslaught/game.cpp:4011 CGame::IsMultiplayer returns true for levels >849 and <900
sourceStaticAnchors.currentPlayerCountGate: references/Onslaught/game.cpp:705 WORLD.IsMultiplayer() sets mPlayers=2, otherwise mPlayers=1
sourceStaticAnchors.controllerAssignmentTrap: references/Onslaught/game.cpp:726 I don't support more than 2 players.
sourceStaticAnchors.latentQuadSplitBranch: references/Onslaught/game.cpp:1793 has an mPlayers==3 or mPlayers==4 render branch, but source-only branch presence is not runtime proof
sourceStaticAnchors.livesAndResultShape: references/Onslaught/game.cpp uses mPlayer1Lives/mPlayer2Lives, P1_OUT_OF_LIVES/P2_OUT_OF_LIVES, and MPDeclarePlayerWon(1/2)
sourceStaticAnchors.nSlotSchemaModeRows: roadmap/original-binary-online-n-slot-session-schema.v1.json keeps cooperative, versus-free-for-all, team-versus, and spectator-admin runtimeProofStatus=planned-not-runtime-proven

currentRuntimeModeClassification.reason: The accepted copied level-850 proofs establish local split-screen P1/P2 routing and host-authority scaffolding, but do not establish objective sharing, scoring, death/win, respawn, team assignment, friendly-fire, spectator/admin, or online mode authority semantics.

requiredRuntimeEvidence: team score or win condition authority
observer camera or read-only viewpoint behavior
no gameplay input injection from spectator slots

classifierRules.description: A level-850 local split-screen proof classifies as unclassified-local-multiplayer until objective, scoring, death/win, respawn, team, and friendly-fire semantics are proven.
A sessionType or modeFamily schema value does not prove the original binary executed that gameplay mode.
Team assignment metadata is not team-versus runtime proof without runtime team membership, team scoring, and friendly-fire evidence.
Spectator/admin metadata is not runtime observer-camera or admin-authority proof.
P3/P4 remain metadata-only and gameplay-rejected until a new original-binary runtime proof class exists.

rejectionCases: reject cooperative runtime proof from sessionType alone
reject versus runtime proof from modeFamily alone
reject team-versus runtime proof from schema-only teamAssignments
reject spectator-admin runtime proof from metadata-only query rows
reject active P3/P4 original-binary gameplay proof from slotCapacity=4
reject second-host LAN proof from same-host, same-workstation, WSL2, or private-interface-only artifacts
reject public matchmaking proof from local session-directory smoke
reject native BEA netcode proof from host-authority wrapper/protocol scaffolding
reject base online multiplayer readiness from joined-session same-host proofs
nextProofLadder: real second-physical-host private LAN command-source proof when a separate client host is available
copied-runtime objective/win/death/respawn observer proof before any co-op or versus runtime claim
team/friendly-fire observer proof before any team-versus runtime claim
spectator/admin camera or command-authorization runtime proof before any spectator-admin runtime claim
retail Ghidra/CDB P3/P4 proof-class deep dive before any original-binary gameplay attempt above P1/P2
